name.ja: <ruby>雷盟<rt>ブリッツクリーク</rt></ruby>－オーバーボルテージ

text.en: Target 1 face-up card on the field; destroy it, also for the rest of this turn, you cannot Special Summon Effect Monsters, except from the hand. If a card(s) is destroyed by your "Blitzclique" card's effect, while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can add this card to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Blitzclique - Overvoltage" once per turn.
